item.title: 低成本人工智能推理挑战GPU经济性，中国TPU之路获得牵引力
item.summary: Generative AI applications are expanding rapidly, making computing costs a growing bottleneck to commercial AI deployment. The AI accelerator market, long dominated by graphics processing units (GPUs), has increasingly explored specialised architectures in recent years. Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), optimised for the
